svg.title: AutoTest Agent Framework — Architecture Overview
svg.desc: Seven-layer architecture: entry points, master orchestrator, three registries, six testing agents, human approval gate, and output layer

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Standalone CLI entry point in the AutoTest Agent Framework in detail')
sendPrompt('Explain the GitHub Copilot SDK integration as an entry point in the AutoTest Agent Framework')
sendPrompt('Explain the REST API microservice entry point in the AutoTest Agent Framework')
sendPrompt('Explain the Master Orchestrator Agent responsibilities in depth — routing, session management, and approval gate')
g.text: Route tasks · Load agents, skills, tools · Drive approval gate · Track session state

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Agent Registry — how does it dynamically load *.agent.md files at runtime?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Skill Registry — how does it dynamically load *.skill.md files at runtime?')
sendPrompt('Explain the Tool Registry — how does it dynamically load *.tool.ts files at runtime?')
sendPrompt('Detail the Playwright Agent — skills, tools, and how it generates and runs E2E tests')
sendPrompt('Detail the API Test Agent — skills, tools, and how it generates REST and GraphQL tests')
sendPrompt('Detail the Performance Agent — skills, tools, and how it runs k6 and Artillery load tests')
sendPrompt('Detail the Unit and Integration Test Agent — skills, tools, Jest, Vitest, pytest')
sendPrompt('Detail the Visual Regression Agent — Pixelmatch, Percy, and snapshot comparison skills')
sendPrompt('Detail the Cucumber Agent — BDD, Gherkin, data-driven test expansion skills')
sendPrompt('Explain the Human Approval Gate in detail — the full semi-autonomous review and fix approval flow')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Report Generator — HTML, JUnit, Allure output formats')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the CI/CD Integration layer — GitHub Actions webhooks and pipeline triggers')
